creator: freebsduser@paradisegreen.co.uk
text:
On 03/01/2011 09:10, Ruslan Mahmatkhanov wrote:
> 03.01.2011 03:46, Thomas Sandford Ð¿Ð¸ÑÐµÑ:
>> I am frankly completely baffled by the Drush release numbering.
>>
>> I had kept the port on the drush-All-versions-3.0.tar.gz
>> release on the basis that this should work for everybody
>> whilst the drush-6.x-3.?.tar.gz versions were only for
>> drupal 6.x users. I had therefore been intending to wait
>> until drush-All-versions-4.0.tar.gz was out the door
>> (which since we are at rc1 stage should hopefully not be
>> too long now).
>>
>> However, I _am_ open to persuasion by persons less baffled.
>
> Don't be confused with 6.x in filename. It will work well both for 6.x
> and 7.x drupal versions. Btw this is stated in onsite documentation.
> Please update to 3.3.

But will the 6.x Drush version also work with drupal 5.X (for which 
there is also a FreeBSD port)? I don't want to break the drush port for 
existing users of either drupal port.

Could you point me at the onsite (drush) documentation where the 
cross-compatibility between drupal versions is documented so I can 
increase my understanding of this issue. I did try to find this when the 
bug was first opened but couldn't find anything relevant.

-- 
Thomas Sandford
